fields.explainZh: 应用的每秒修改的块数。
fields.explainEn: Number of block changes per second in the application.

fields.explainZh: 不需要进行磁盘访问的情况下，在内存中找到常用数据块的频率。
fields.explainEn: Frequency of finding commonly used data blocks in memory without disk access.

unitList.nameEn: No Wait for Obtaining Data from Memory

fields.nameZh: 内存获取数据无等待率
fields.nameEn: No Wait Ratio for Obtaining Data from Memory
fields.explainZh: 应用的从内存获取数据时无需等待的比率。
fields.explainEn: No Wait Ratio for Obtaining Data from Memory.
Name of the database.
Flashback settings enabled.
Mode of the job.

fields.explainZh: 用户对该项作业的名称。
fields.explainEn: User-supplied name for the job (or the default name generated by the server).
Current job state.
Type of job.

fields.explainZh: 启动该作业的用户名称。
fields.explainEn: User that initiated the job.

fields.explainZh: CPU用于执行及解析的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of CPU used for execution and parsing.
Hit rate of the Process Global Area (PGA).
DB time of the application.

fields.explainZh: 数据字典已使用缓存占总大小的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of used dictionary cache to total size.

fields.explainZh: 应用在RAC中运行时的磁盘缓存访问率。
fields.explainEn: Disk cache access rate when the application is running in RAC.

fields.explainZh: 应用在RAC中运行时节点间的内联流量。
fields.explainEn: Inline traffic between nodes when the application is running in RAC.

fields.explainZh: 应用每秒执行的SQL语句数。
fields.explainEn: Number of SQL statements executed by the application per second.

fields.explainZh: 应用对SQL语句的执行与分析比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of execution to analysis of SQL statements in the application.

fields.explainZh: 数据库闪回区的使用率。
fields.explainEn: Flash Recovery Area Usage Ratio.

fields.explainZh: 应用每秒硬解析SQL语句的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of hard parses of SQL statements per second in the application.
Completion time of the Oracle installation.
Current role of the database.

fields.explainZh: 指数据库是否处于强制日志记录模式。
fields.explainEn: Indicates whether the database is under force logging mode (YES) or not (NO).

fields.explainZh: 是否将事务写入日志，包括ARCHIVELOG和NOARCHIVELOG两种模式。
fields.explainEn: Whether transactions are written to the log, including ARCHIVELOG and NOARCHIVELOG modes.

fields.explainZh: 数据库实例的打开模式，包括只读和读写两种模式。
fields.explainEn: Open mode of the database instance, including read-only and read-write modes.
Oracle startup duration.
Start time of Oracle.
Version number of Oracle.

fields.explainZh: 每条SQL语句的平均执行次数。
fields.explainEn: Average execution times of each SQL statement.
Data block size of the Oracle application.

fields.explainZh: 数据库的所占磁盘空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of the disk space occupied by the database.

fields.explainZh: 磁盘排序和内存排序的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of disk sorting to memory sorting.

fields.explainZh: 磁盘排序和内存排序的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of disk sorting to memory sorting.

fields.explainZh: 一个采集间隔内，平均每秒磁盘排序的次数。
fields.explainEn: Average number of disk sorts per second within a collection interval.

fields.explainZh: 磁盘排序和内存排序的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of disk sorting to memory sorting.

fields.explainZh: 一个采集间隔内，平均每秒内存排序的次数。
fields.explainEn: Average number of memory sorts per second within a collection interval.

fields.explainZh: 从数据库读取数据的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of times data is read from the database.

fields.explainZh: 向数据库写入数据的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of times data is written to the database.
Latch hit ratio of the application.
Library cache hit ratio of the application.

fields.explainZh: 应用在RAC中运行时的本地缓存访问率。
fields.explainEn: Local cache access ratio of the application running in RAC.

fields.explainZh: 应用的每秒逻辑读的块数。
fields.explainEn: Number of logical chunk reads per second of the application.
Number of logins per second of the application.

fields.explainZh: SQL语句在内存中进行排序的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of SQL statement sorting in memory.
Running efficiency of application's SQL statement.

fields.explainZh: 应用每秒解析SQL语句的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of SQL statement parses per second in the application.

fields.explainZh: 应用的SQL语句解析效率。解析效率=CPU时间/解析时间，由于CPU时间是一点一点记录并累加，而解析时间是一段一段记录并累加的，所以由于计算误差存在，可能导致该值大于100%。
fields.explainEn: Parse Efficiency: Efficiency that the Oracle application parses SQL statements.Parse efficiency = CPU time / actual parse time. The value might be larger than 100% because the CPU time is calculated based on time points and the actual parse time is calculated based on time ranges.
Remaining space size of PGA.

fields.explainZh: PGA已使用缓存占总大小的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of PGA used cache to total size.
Total space size of PGA.
Used space size of PGA.

fields.explainZh: 数据库服务器的物理内存。
fields.explainEn: Physical memory of the database server.

fields.explainZh: 应用的每秒物理读的块数。
fields.explainEn: Number of physical reads per second from the application.

fields.explainZh: 应用的每秒物理写的块数。
fields.explainEn: Number of physical writes per second from the application.
Status of the port.

fields.explainZh: 备库应用的进程ID_进程名称。
fields.explainEn: Process ID and process name of the standby database application.
Process ID of the standby database application.
Process name of the standby database application.
Status of the standby database application process.

fields.explainZh: 指Oracle服务启动时间到当前采集时间的时间间隔。
fields.explainEn: Refers to the time interval between the Oracle service startup time and the current collection time.
Running status of cluster instance.
State of cluster database.

fields.explainZh: 集群实例所有主机名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of all hosts for cluster instance.

fields.explainZh: 集群实例是否允许登录。
fields.explainEn: Whether cluster instance allows login.
Name of cluster instance.
Number of cluster instance.
Whether cluster instance is loading.
Number of redo threads in cluster instance.
Role of cluster instance.
Startup time of cluster instance.
State of cluster instance.
Version of cluster instance.

unitList.nameZh: 重做日志缓冲区获取无等待
unitList.nameEn: No Wait for Obtaining Redo Log Buffer

fields.nameZh: 重做日志缓冲区获取无等待率
fields.nameEn: No Wait Ratio for Obtaining Redo Log Buffer
fields.explainZh: 应用获取重做日志缓冲区时无需等待的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of times the application does not need to wait to obtain redo log buffer.

fields.explainZh: 应用在RAC中运行时的远程缓存访问率。
fields.explainEn: Remote cache access rate when application runs in RAC.
Number of blocks in rollback segment.
Current size of rollback segment.

fields.explainZh: 扩展回退段以获得新扩展的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of times rollback segment has been extended for new extensions.

fields.explainZh: 当前回退段获取的个数。
fields.explainEn: Current number of gets on rollback segment.
Maximum size of rollback segment.
Size of first extent segment.
Maximum number of extent segments.
Minimum number of extent segments.
Size of second extent segment.

fields.explainZh: 回退段获取和回退段等待的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of rollback segment gets to waits.
Name of rollback segment.
Number of times rollback segment has been shrunk.
State of rollback segment.

fields.explainZh: 包含回退段的表空间名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of tablespace containing rollback segment.

fields.explainZh: 当前等待获取回退段的等待个数。
fields.explainEn: Current number of waits for rollback segment.

fields.explainZh: 回退段中从一个扩展段跨到另一个段的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of times there has been a wrap between extent segments in rollback segment.
Name of transaction.
Session ID.
SQL executed by transaction.

fields.explainZh: Oracle发生行链接和行迁移的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of row links and row migrations that happened in Oracle.
Name of event.
Number of events that session has encountered.
Number of seconds session has waited.
ID of session to which transaction belongs.
Waiting state of session.
Current type of application.

fields.explainZh: Oracle用户名，当为后台进程时，该值为空。
fields.explainEn: Username of the session, which is null when the process is backend.
Cache size of buffer.
Size of Oracle cache.

fields.explainZh: 在整个实例中固定的SGA的大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of fixed SGA across entire instance.

fields.explainZh: 数据字典和行缓存的缓存大小。
fields.explainEn: Cache size of data dictionary and row cache.
Buffer size for REDO log.
Size of shared pool.

fields.explainZh: 使用SQL/PL语句的SQL区域的大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of SQL area used by SQL/PL statements.
Free space of shared pool.

fields.explainZh: 共享池已使用大小占总大小的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of used size of shared pool to total size.

fields.explainZh: 共享池已使用空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Used space size of shared pool.

fields.explainZh: 不需要进行磁盘访问的情况下，在内存中找到常用数据块的频率。
fields.explainEn: Frequency of finding commonly used data blocks in memory without requiring disk access.

fields.explainZh: 不需要进行磁盘访问的情况下，在内存中找到数据字典的频率。
fields.explainEn: Frequency of finding data dictionary in memory without requiring disk access.

fields.explainZh: Oracle应用分配到的内存大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of memory allocated to Oracle application.

fields.explainZh: 库缓存保存所有共享的SQL和PL/SQL块以及其分析树。在大量用户进入并且交换数据的OLTP环境中，很可能存在不同查询的重叠分析和执行。库中的这种重叠称为缓存命中，错过和命中的比率称为库缓存命中率。
fields.explainEn: The library cache stores all shared SQL and PL/SQL blocks along with their parsing trees. In an OLTP environment with a large number of users accessing and exchanging data, overlapping parsing and execution of different queries might possibly exist. This overlap in the library is called cache hits, and the ratio of misses to hits is known as the library cache hit ratio.

fields.explainZh: 大型池已使用大小占总大小的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of used size of large pool to total size.

fields.explainZh: SGA已使用缓存占总大小的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of used SGA cache to total size.
Used space size of SGA.
Hard parse ratio of application's SQL statement.
Soft parse ratio of application's SQL statement.

fields.explainZh: 共享SQL区已使用缓存占总大小的比率。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of used cache of shared SQL area to total size.
Name of the tablespace.
Free space fragmentation index.
Number of available blocks in the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 可以使用的表空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Available size of the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 表空间的最大可扩展量。
fields.explainEn: Maximum expandable size of the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 扩展至最大可扩展容量后可以使用的表空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Available tablespace size after expansion to the maximum expandable capacity.
Number of reads from the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 每次读表空间所需的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time required for each read from the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 表空间的状态，可能为ONLINE、OFFLINE或INVALID。
fields.explainEn: Status of the tablespace, could be ONLINE, OFFLINE, or INVALID.
Name of the tablespace.
Total number of bytes in the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 已经使用的表空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Used size of the tablespace.
Usage ratio of the tablespace.
Number of writes to the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 每次写表空间所需的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time required for each write to the tablespace.
Name of the temporary tablespace.
Maximum expansion of the temporary tablespace.
Status of the temporary tablespace.
Total number of blocks in the temporary tablespace.
Number of blocks used in the temporary tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 临时表空间已使用字节数。
fields.explainEn: Number of bytes used in the temporary tablespace.
Usage ratio of the temporary tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 应用每秒执行的SQL语句数。
fields.explainEn: Number of SQL statements executed per second by the application.
Total number of transfers.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
